name: @repo/short-slide-down
description: A ShortSlideDown text animation component for SmoothUI.

useCases: Stacked word-by-word reveal for centered multi-line headings
Keynote-style editorial builds with vertical push
Short three-word phrases built into a centered column
compositionHints: Best on 2-4 word phrases; each word occupies its own line
Use large font sizes (48px+) for the vertical displacement to read clearly
